entity.summary: Decentralized exchange candidate identified in the HEI verified-unadded backlog from CoinGecko and DefiLlama source data and currently treated as an active DEX record.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded backlog rows hei_unadded_0008 and hei_unadded_0009. Source evidence is limited to CoinGecko and DefiLlama database references, so this record should be improved later if stronger official-history evidence is found.

events.title: 1DEX present in exchange and DEX source data
events.description: 1DEX appeared in the verified-unadded candidate generator from CoinGecko and DefiLlama source data as an exchange-like DEX candidate not found in current HEI records.
events.notes: This is a database-reference event, not a verified launch event. Replace with a proper launch/history event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchanges reference for 1DEX
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0008, with domain 1dex.com and source id one_dex.

evidence.title: DefiLlama DEX overview reference for 1DEX
